roles.name: Head of the Service (M)
roles.description: Director-General of the Secret Intelligence Service — designs the over-arching mission architecture and signs the licence to kill.

roles.name: Section Chief
roles.description: Runs the operation from desk to dead-drop — tracks every agent, asset, and timeline against M's brief.

roles.name: Quartermaster Branch (Q)
roles.description: Steward of the kit — manages gadgets, badges, fields, layouts, and every gizmo that comes through Q-Branch.

roles.name: Q-Branch Engineer
roles.description: Builds the exploding pens and Aston Martins of Apex — bespoke automation for licensed-to-kill workloads.

roles.name: Head of Station — Americas
roles.description: Senior officer over all Western-hemisphere Salesforce operations — sets tradecraft and mentors junior agents.

roles.name: 00 Agent — Senior Field Officer
roles.description: Holds a double-O number — operates with autonomy across enemy borders of customer requirements.

roles.name: Field Operative
roles.description: Carries discovery, configuration, and recon across the realm under the 00's command.

roles.name: Cipher Bureau Chief
roles.description: Architect of the great signal lines between MI6 and the realms beyond — APIs, middleware, and event flows.

roles.name: Cryptographer — Senior
roles.description: Lays the cipher and the canal between systems under the Bureau Chief's plan.

roles.name: Cryptographer — Junior
roles.description: Apprentice of the cipher — webhooks, callouts, and the patient art of error handling.

roles.name: Internal Affairs Auditor
roles.description: Sweeps every safehouse for bugs — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the Minister.

roles.name: Director of Public Affairs
roles.description: Lifts the banner for the Service to the world above — leads all marketing and cover-story craft.

roles.name: Press Liaison Officer
roles.description: Strategist of the public face — campaigns, narratives, and the careful leak.

roles.name: Cover Story Specialist
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily brush-pass.

roles.name: Mission Briefing Analyst
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the Minister and the operatives.

roles.name: Master Armourer
roles.description: Senior smith of the Service's heavy ordnance — Apex frameworks, platform features, and the deepest delvings.

roles.name: Trainee Operative
roles.description: Fresh from the Fort — learns the ropes of configuration, declarative tradecraft, and not blowing one's cover.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every era starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Each Bond era becomes a realm with its own cast of villains, allies, and field officers.

realms.projectName: Connery Era — Cold War Counter-Intelligence Rollout

connery-era.name: Briefing at Universal Exports
connery-era.description: Discovery sign-off — M briefs 007 from behind the padded door.

connery-era.name: Q-Branch Kit Issued
connery-era.description: Build kickoff: Walther PPK, Aston Martin DB5, ejector seat installed.

connery-era.name: Audience at Goldfinger's Stud Farm
connery-era.description: Mid-project gate: villain encounter and laser-table review.

connery-era.name: Operation Grand Slam Foiled
connery-era.description: Phase invoice trigger: Fort Knox heist averted.

connery-era.name: Crab Key Lair Demolished
connery-era.description: Go-Live: Dr. No's reactor goes critical, mission complete.

connery-era.name: Debrief and Martini
connery-era.description: Hyper-care close: shaken, not stirred — handover at the bar.

moore-era.name: Yacht-side Briefing
moore-era.description: Project kickoff: cocktails on the Riviera, eyebrow lifted.

moore-era.name: Lotus Submersible Delivered
moore-era.description: Build phase: car-becomes-submarine ready for sea trials.

moore-era.name: Atlantis Base Infiltrated
moore-era.description: UAT gate: Stromberg's undersea citadel surveyed and breached.

moore-era.name: Moonraker Shuttle Recovered
moore-era.description: Go-Live: orbital station Drax neutralised, nerve gas contained.

moore-era.name: Octopussy Circus Closed
moore-era.description: Hyper-care close: jewel-smuggling ring rolled up cleanly.

moore-era.name: Final Bill from Q-Branch
moore-era.description: Final invoice: gadget repair, ski-pole rockets, one Lotus.

brosnan-era.name: Severnaya Discovery
brosnan-era.description: Discovery: GoldenEye satellite weapon catalogued and traced.

brosnan-era.name: Tank Chase Through St Petersburg
brosnan-era.description: Build: heavy-armour deployment through downtown infrastructure.

brosnan-era.name: Audit at Carver Media Group
brosnan-era.description: Solution review with the press baron himself.

brosnan-era.name: Stealth Ship Sunk
brosnan-era.description: Go-Live: Carver's stealth ship neutralised in international waters.

brosnan-era.name: Nuclear Submarine Recovered
brosnan-era.description: Project close: Renard contained, Elektra King handled.

brosnan-era.name: Final Reckoning with Janus
brosnan-era.description: Final invoice from MI6 — 006's defection accounted for.

craig-era.name: Casino Royale Buy-in
craig-era.description: Kickoff: high-stakes table at Montenegro, Le Chiffre opposite.

craig-era.name: Quantum Cell Dismantled
craig-era.description: Discovery: Quantum's Bolivia operation rolled up.

craig-era.name: Skyfall Lodge Defended
craig-era.description: Build: Silva's siege of the Highland lodge survived.

craig-era.name: Spectre Audit at L'Américain
craig-era.description: UAT acceptance: Blofeld unmasked, organisation map complete.

craig-era.name: Heracles Project Neutralised
craig-era.description: Go-Live + handoff: Safin's nanobot facility destroyed.

craig-era.name: Final Toast at the Service
craig-era.description: Final invoice: a salute to a fallen agent — 007 stands down.

Sean Connery's James Bond.notes: Recuperation in the Bahamas — pina colada and physiotherapy.

Moneypenny (Lois Maxwell).notes: Long weekend — finally took the holiday she's been saving.

Felix Leiter.notes: Langley conference — annual CIA liaison summit.

Roger Moore's James Bond.notes: Skiing in St Moritz — and a 'work' encounter on the slopes.

Holly Goodhead.notes: NASA refresher training — zero-G certification renewal.

Pierce Brosnan's James Bond.notes: Caribbean sabbatical — beach, BMW, and a brief cigar.

M (Judi Dench).notes: Cabinet Office briefings — closed-door PM session.

Wai Lin.notes: Chinese New Year — family obligations in Beijing.

Q (Ben Whishaw).notes: Cat-sitting weekend — the two Sphynxes need attention.

Moneypenny (Naomie Harris).notes: Weekend at the range — keeping the field-shot certified.

Madeleine Swann.notes: Family matter in the French Alps — taking Mathilde to the lake.
